name: z-vhealth-core
top_risk: Learning/signal health is low — add real task log / signal before scaling work.
top_risks: Learning/signal health is low — add real task log / signal before scaling work.
System coherence misaligned — layers disagree; resolve signal vs structure.
Z-VDK: 2 high-severity path(s) (often Downloads installers) — confirm origin.

recommended_challenge.title: Signal + coherence refresh
recommended_challenge.reason: Coherence or signal reports show strain — strengthen real log lines and refresh scans.
recommended_challenge.safe_action: Append task JSONL entries, then npm run zuno:state

challenge_queue.title: Signal + coherence refresh
challenge_queue.why: Coherence or signal reports show strain — strengthen real log lines and refresh scans.
challenge_queue.safe_command: Append task JSONL entries, then npm run zuno:state

challenge_queue.title: VDK calm review
challenge_queue.why: VDK has multiple findings — review the latest findings report; no quarantine in Phase 1.

challenge_queue.title: Observer freshness
challenge_queue.why: Keep AAFRTC + comms manifests in window for clear cross-layer reads.
challenge_queue.safe_command: node scripts/z_aafrtc_resolve.mjs  # then npm run comms:github-ai as needed

preparation_plan: If VDK age is stale: npm run vdk:scan && npm run vdk:report
If storage unknown: npm run fpsmc:scan && npm run fpsmc:report
Archive Zuno if desired: npm run zuno:state:archive -- --force

notes.scoring: Heuristic blend from Zuno, QOSMEI, coherence, comms, guardian, alerts, FPSMC, VDK, release, optional enforcer
